Extension Icons Needed

You need to add three icon sizes for the Chrome extension:
- icon16.png (16x16 pixels)
- icon48.png (48x48 pixels)
- icon128.png (128x128 pixels)

These icons represent your extension in:
- icon16.png: Browser toolbar
- icon48.png: Extensions management page
- icon128.png: Chrome Web Store

Design suggestions:
- Use a simple, recognizable symbol (e.g., three speech bubbles, a balance scale, or shopping cart)
- Gradient colors matching your UI (purple/blue: #667eea to #764ba2)
- Clear silhouette that works at small sizes
- Transparent background (PNG format)

Tools to create icons:
- Figma (free, online)
- Canva (free templates)
- Adobe Illustrator
- Inkscape (free, open source)

Once you have your icons, place them in this directory and remove this file.
